title: BTC 4H TSMOM Sweep
hypothesis: Long-only BTC 4H time-series momentum with a trend regime filter can survive fees and slippage across multiple crypto eras.

artifact_refs.description: Primary BTC bench report generated from the structured bench spec.
Bench spec snapshot used for the run.

notes: First bench-spec-driven crypto report bundle.
Base config only for now; sweep expansion should append more artifact refs later.

notes: Research-only BTC 4H trend-following skeleton.
Uses EMA crossover, 200-SMA regime filter, NATR gate, chandelier stop, and opposite-cross exit.
Suggested exposure comes from a vol-target wrapper, but the current report is still unit-notional and pre-cost.
Gross trade metrics reflect the raw BTC skeleton output before fees and slippage.
Net metrics apply one-way slippage at entry and exit plus the configured round-trip fee budget.
